## Summary

Replace static Mermaid diagrams with interactive D3.js + dagre **pathographs** on disorder HTML pages. Inspired by [CommunityMech PR #13](https://github.com/CultureBotAI/CommunityMech/pull/13).

- **`graph.py`**: Add `graph_to_json()` — serializes causal graphs to JSON with rich node metadata (evidence counts, cell types, GO processes, genes, locations, frequency, severity)
- **`render.py`**: Pass pathograph JSON to the Jinja2 template
- **`disorder.html.j2`**: Replace Mermaid `<pre>` block with interactive D3.js SVG featuring dagre hierarchical layout, distinct node shapes per type, hover tooltips, click-to-highlight, legend filtering, zoom/pan, and accessibility attributes
- **`docs/pathographs.md`**: Comprehensive documentation with screenshots
- **`scripts/screenshot_pathograph.js`**: Playwright script for regenerating screenshots

![Complex pathograph with many mechanisms and phenotypes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/monarch-initiative/dismech/claude/add-pathograph-support-6QpbL/docs/images/pathograph_ehlers_danlos.png)

## Node types and shapes

| Type | Shape | Color |
|------|-------|-------|
| Pathophysiology | Rounded rectangle | Blue |
| Phenotype | Ellipse | Amber |
| Environmental | Diamond | Green |
| Genetic | Hexagon | Purple |
| Treatment | Rectangle | Pink |
| Biochemical | Circle | Indigo |
| Orphan (undefined target) | Dashed red border | Red |

## Design decisions

- **Dagre layout** (not force-directed) — preserves the left-to-right causal flow that is the point of these graphs
- **D3.js + dagre via CDN** — no build step, matches CommunityMech precedent
- **Mermaid code generation preserved** — `generate_mermaid()` still works for non-HTML contexts (markdown export, comorbidity pages)
- **`JSON.parse({{ data | tojson }})` instead of `{{ data | safe }}`** — prevents XSS via node descriptions containing `</script>`
- **Distinct shapes per node type** — accessibility for colorblind users

## CI note

The test failure (`Glutaryl-CoA_Dehydrogenase_Deficiency.yaml` reference format) is **pre-existing on `main`** — not introduced by this PR.

## What's included

- Source changes: `graph.py`, `render.py`, `disorder.html.j2`
- Documentation: `docs/pathographs.md` with screenshots
- Screenshot script: `scripts/screenshot_pathograph.js`
- `.gitignore`: Added `node_modules/` and npm artifacts

## What should NOT be merged

The `pages/disorders/*.html` files were regenerated for screenshot purposes only. These are derived files that should be regenerated by the weekly job after merge. Consider excluding them from merge or letting the weekly job overwrite.

## Test plan

- [x] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [x] `uv run python -m pytest` — only pre-existing failure (same on main)
- [x] `uv run python -m dismech.render kb/disorders/Asthma.yaml` renders successfully
- [x] Screenshots verified: graph renders with correct shapes, colors, tooltips, and highlighting
- [ ] Manual browser test: open rendered HTML, verify zoom/pan, tooltips, click-highlight, legend filtering
